_comment: AI Generation Pipeline Configuration - attire descriptors, native pairings, and costume references for all leader x civilization combinations

rome.name: Roman Empire
rome.setting: Roman columns, marble architecture, Roman eagle standards

male_attire.clothing: imperial toga picta with broad purple border over white tunica, gold-embroidered hem, draped over left shoulder with sinus fold
male_attire.headwear: laurel wreath of gold leaves
male_attire.accessories: gold fibula brooch at shoulder, imperial signet ring, gold arm bands, calcei patricii boots

female_attire.clothing: stola in Tyrian purple with gold-threaded borders over inner tunica, palla draped gracefully over left shoulder
female_attire.headwear: golden stephane diadem with inset gems, or pearl-woven hairnet (reticulum)
female_attire.accessories: pearl necklace in multiple strands, gold armillae bracelets, cameo brooch, gold serpentine earrings

egypt.name: Ancient Egypt
egypt.setting: pyramids, hieroglyphics, Nile river, papyrus columns

male_attire.clothing: white linen shendyt kilt with pleated front panel, sheer linen robe over shoulders with gold-beaded collar (wesekh)
male_attire.headwear: nemes headdress in striped blue and gold linen, or double crown (pschent) of Upper and Lower Egypt
male_attire.accessories: wide usekh collar of gold, turquoise, and lapis lazuli, gold wrist cuffs, ceremonial crook and flail

female_attire.clothing: form-fitting white linen kalasiris sheath dress with broad beaded straps, sheer pleated outer robe
female_attire.headwear: vulture headdress with uraeus cobra, or gold circlet with lotus motif and long braided wig
female_attire.accessories: broad usekh collar of gold and faience beads, gold serpent arm bands, ankh pendant, kohl-lined eyes

greece.name: Ancient Greece
greece.setting: Parthenon, Greek columns, olive groves, Aegean sea

male_attire.clothing: white linen chiton with meander (Greek key) border in gold, himation draped over left shoulder, pinned at right
male_attire.headwear: olive wreath (kotinos) or gold laurel stephanos
male_attire.accessories: gold fibula pin at shoulder, embossed bronze belt, leather sandals with gold buckles

female_attire.clothing: floor-length Doric peplos in saffron or white linen, belted at waist with gold cord, pleated chiton underneath
female_attire.headwear: gold diadem with floral motifs, or woven fillet ribbon through upswept hair
female_attire.accessories: gold disc earrings, snake-form arm bracelet, amber bead necklace, decorated girdle belt

han.name: Han Dynasty China
han.setting: Chinese palace, silk banners, Great Wall in distance

male_attire.clothing: layered silk hanfu with wide sleeves and crossed collar (jiaoling youren), outer shenyi robe in deep red with gold-embroidered dragon motifs, sash belt at waist
male_attire.headwear: black lacquered guan cap (jinxian guan) with jade pin, or mianguan ceremonial crown with bead curtains
male_attire.accessories: jade bi disc pendant on silk cord, jade belt hook, silk fan, embroidered cloth shoes

female_attire.clothing: layered silk hanfu with wide flowing sleeves, deep ruqun bodice and skirt combination, sash tied at high waist with trailing ribbons
female_attire.headwear: elaborate gold buyao hairpin with dangling jade pendants, hair in high cloud bun (yunjibun)
female_attire.accessories: jade disc earrings, gold filigree necklace, silk waist sash with jade ornament, painted silk fan

khmer.name: Khmer Empire
khmer.setting: Angkor Wat temple, tropical vegetation, stone carvings, lotus-filled moats

male_attire.clothing: silk sampot chang kben draped between legs and tucked at back, bare chest with crossed gold sash (sabai), ornate gold belt
male_attire.headwear: tiered gold mukut crown with pointed spire, or conical gold diadem
male_attire.accessories: elaborate gold collar necklace, gold arm bands, ankle bracelets, gold rings on every finger

female_attire.clothing: silk sampot draped as long skirt with gold-threaded border, sabai cloth draped diagonally across chest over one shoulder, jeweled belt
female_attire.headwear: ornate gold mukut crown with floral finials, or tiered gold diadem with flame motifs, hair in elaborate updo
female_attire.accessories: wide gold choker with lotus motif, gold chandelier earrings, stacked gold bangles, jeweled anklets

maurya.name: Maurya Empire
maurya.setting: Indian palace, Ashoka pillar with lion capital, lotus gardens

male_attire.clothing: fine white cotton antariya dhoti draped in kachha style, uttariya shoulder cloth with gold borders, light muslin upper garment
male_attire.headwear: jeweled turban (ushnisha) with central gem and peacock feather, or gold crown with lotus motifs
male_attire.accessories: layered gold necklaces with pendant gems, jeweled arm bands (keyura), gold earrings, ornate belt with tiger-head buckle

female_attire.clothing: unstitched cotton sari in white or saffron with gold-embroidered border (zari), draped elegantly with pleated front and pallu over shoulder
female_attire.headwear: gold maang tikka forehead ornament with chain into hair parting, hair in braided bun with jasmine flowers
female_attire.accessories: gold jhumka earrings, choker necklace with pendant, stacked gold bangles, waist chain (kamarband), nose ring

maya.name: Maya Civilization
maya.setting: Maya step pyramid, jungle canopy, carved stelae, sacred cenote

male_attire.clothing: woven cotton loincloth (ex) with elaborate embroidered panel, jaguar-skin hip drape, jade-beaded pectoral chest piece
male_attire.headwear: towering quetzal-feather headdress with jade mosaic brow band and carved jade central ornament
male_attire.accessories: large jade ear spools, jade bead necklace in multiple tiers, obsidian lip plug, shell and jade wrist cuffs

female_attire.clothing: white cotton huipil tunic with elaborate red and blue geometric embroidery, wrapped cotton skirt tied at waist
female_attire.headwear: quetzal feather fan headdress with jade brow ornament, hair woven with colored threads and jade beads
female_attire.accessories: large jade disc earrings, layered jade bead necklace, shell bracelet, painted body designs in red

mississippian.name: Mississippian Culture
mississippian.setting: earthen mound (Cahokia), river valley, ceremonial plaza, wooden palisade

male_attire.clothing: tanned deerskin breechcloth with painted symbols, feathered mantle draped over shoulders, copper-decorated chest plate
male_attire.headwear: copper forehead plate with embossed falcon motif, or feathered headdress with dyed turkey feathers
male_attire.accessories: large marine shell gorget with cross-in-circle design, copper ear spools, shell bead necklace (wampum strands), face paint

female_attire.clothing: woven fiber wraparound skirt with geometric patterns, deerskin shawl over shoulders with shell-bead fringe
female_attire.headwear: shell and seed bead headband, hair parted center with bun at nape adorned with feathers
female_attire.accessories: columella shell pendant necklace, copper hair pins, shell ear ornaments, woven cane bracelet

persia.name: Achaemenid Persia
persia.setting: Persepolis columns, Persian relief carvings, royal paradise garden

male_attire.clothing: flowing Persian riding robe (kandys) draped over shoulders, embroidered under-tunic with wide sleeves, fitted trousers tucked into soft boots
male_attire.headwear: fluted tiara (kitaris) or tall felt bashlyk cap, or crenellated gold crown
male_attire.accessories: gold torque neck ring with lion-head terminals, gold arm bands with griffon motifs, ornate gold belt, gold earring

female_attire.clothing: richly embroidered floor-length tunic with wide sleeves in purple and blue, light veil draped from crown, flowing trousers beneath
female_attire.headwear: gold diadem with rosette motifs and dangling chain ornaments, or tall headdress with veil
female_attire.accessories: gold torque necklace, elaborate gold disc earrings, gold bracelets with inlaid lapis lazuli, jeweled belt sash

aksum.name: Kingdom of Aksum
aksum.setting: Aksum stelae obelisks, Ethiopian highlands, ancient stone church

male_attire.clothing: draped white cotton shamma with broad colored border stripe (tibeb) in red and gold, wrapped over both shoulders, embroidered tunic underneath
male_attire.headwear: tall gold Aksumite crown with cross finial, or cloth headwrap with gold circlet
male_attire.accessories: large gold cross pendant on chain, gold arm bands, ornate gold ring, ceremonial fly whisk

female_attire.clothing: white cotton kemis dress to ankles with colorful embroidered borders (tibeb), netela shawl draped over hair and shoulders
female_attire.headwear: gold filigree headband with dangling coin ornaments, or embroidered headscarf with gold circlet
female_attire.accessories: large gold hoop earrings, layered gold necklace with cross pendant, silver bangles, tattoo-style forehead cross

assyria.name: Neo-Assyrian Empire
assyria.setting: Nineveh palace gates, lamassu winged bull statues, cuneiform-inscribed walls, Assyrian relief carvings

male_attire.clothing: elaborately fringed woolen robe with geometric rosette embroidery, cross-body sash with tasseled ends, layered shawl over one shoulder
male_attire.headwear: tall conical fez-like royal cap (kularis) with gold band and rosette, or gold headband with horned divine crown
male_attire.accessories: intricately curled and oiled square-cut beard, gold earrings, wide gold bracelet with inlaid rosettes, ceremonial mace

female_attire.clothing: fringed woolen robe with layered rosette-pattern embroidery, draped shawl pinned at shoulder, ankle-length with wide sash belt
female_attire.headwear: gold diadem with rosette and palmette motifs, hair in elaborate braided coils with gold ribbon woven through
female_attire.accessories: gold hoop earrings with granulation, wide gold cuff bracelets with lapis lazuli inlay, gold choker, kohl-lined eyes

carthage.name: Carthaginian Republic
carthage.setting: Carthage harbor with warships, Temple of Tanit, Phoenician purple-dye workshops, Mediterranean coast

male_attire.clothing: Phoenician-style long tunic in Tyrian purple with gold-embroidered borders, lighter linen under-tunic, draped mantle clasped at right shoulder
male_attire.headwear: pointed Phoenician cap (pileus) in purple felt, or gold diadem with crescent moon of Tanit
male_attire.accessories: gold Tanit pendant (triangle with disc and crescent), gold signet ring with ship seal, ivory-handled curved sword (falcata)

female_attire.clothing: flowing Tyrian purple tunic with gold-embroidered hem, sheer linen overdress, sash belt with tasseled ends
female_attire.headwear: gold tiara with crescent moon and disc of Tanit, or embroidered veil over elaborate curled hair
female_attire.accessories: gold crescent earrings, Tanit symbol pendant necklace, glass bead bracelets in many colors, gold anklets

silla.name: Silla Kingdom
silla.setting: Gyeongju capital, Cheomseongdae observatory, Buddhist temple, gold crown tombs, Silla pagoda

male_attire.clothing: silk dopo-style layered robe with wide sleeves in deep blue, white inner garment with tied front, baji trousers, sash belt with gold buckle
male_attire.headwear: tall black lacquered gwanmo official's cap with gold ornamental wings, or gold Silla crown with upright tree and antler branches
male_attire.accessories: jade comma-shaped gogok bead necklace (magatama), gold belt with dangling pendants, ornamental sword in gold scabbard

female_attire.clothing: short jeogori jacket with ribbon tie (otgoreum) over high-waisted full chima skirt in flowing silk, layered with sheer outer robe
female_attire.headwear: gold Silla queen's crown with upright leaf and tree ornaments, jade comma beads dangling from sides, or gold filigree hairpin
female_attire.accessories: gold filigree earrings with dangling chains, layered gold and jade necklace, gold girdle belt with pendant ornaments

tonga.name: Tu'i Tonga Empire
tonga.setting: Ha'amonga 'a Maui stone trilithon, Pacific ocean, tapa-decorated fale house, coral reef lagoon

male_attire.clothing: fine woven ta'ovala waist mat over tapa bark cloth (ngatu) wraparound skirt, bare chest with diagonal sash of woven pandanus leaf
male_attire.headwear: garland of frangipani flowers and green leaves, or woven headband with red feather tufts
male_attire.accessories: whale tooth tabua pendant on braided coconut fiber cord, shell necklace, tattoo patterns (pe'a) on thighs and torso

female_attire.clothing: decorated tapa bark cloth wraparound skirt to mid-calf, fine woven pandanus-leaf kiekie waist garment, tapa shoulder drape
female_attire.headwear: crown of fragrant flowers (heilala blossoms) and woven green leaves, or decorated tapa headband
female_attire.accessories: whale tooth pendant necklace, shell and coconut bead lei, tattooed hands (tatatau), scented coconut oil on skin

abbasid.name: Abbasid Caliphate
abbasid.setting: Islamic geometric architecture, Baghdad skyline, ornate library (House of Wisdom), muqarnas arches

male_attire.clothing: layered black silk robe (khil'a) with gold tiraz embroidered bands on upper arms, white inner thobe, wide sash at waist
male_attire.headwear: black turban (imamah) wrapped over tall qalansuwa cap, with jeweled brooch at front
male_attire.accessories: gold-hilted ceremonial dagger, jeweled ring of authority, ivory prayer beads, calligraphy scroll

female_attire.clothing: richly embroidered silk dress with gold tiraz bands on sleeves, flowing outer robe in deep blue, wide embroidered sash
female_attire.headwear: silk veil draped loosely over elaborately braided hair, gold circlet with pendant gems at forehead
female_attire.accessories: gold filigree earrings, pearl and gold necklace, henna-decorated hands, jeweled gold bracelets

chola.name: Chola Dynasty
chola.setting: Brihadeeswarar temple, South Indian gopuram gateway, naval fleet, Chola bronze sculptures

male_attire.clothing: white silk veshti dhoti with gold zari border wrapped in pancha-kacham style, bare chest with sacred thread (yajnopavita), silk angavastram shoulder cloth
male_attire.headwear: jeweled gold kireedam crown with fan-shaped crest, or gold-threaded turban with ruby centerpiece
male_attire.accessories: elaborate gold necklace with temple-style pendant (haram), thick gold arm bands (vanki), gold waist chain, gold toe rings

female_attire.clothing: nine-yard silk sari in deep red with heavy gold zari border draped in Chola-period style, unstitched bodice cloth, gold waist belt
female_attire.headwear: gold jadai nagam hair braid ornament with fan pendant, surya-chandra (sun-moon) gold hair pins, jasmine garland in hair
female_attire.accessories: gold temple jewelry set with ruby and emerald, chandelier jhumka earrings, mango-motif gold choker, nose ring (nath), heavy gold bangles

hawaii.name: Kingdom of Hawaii
hawaii.setting: volcanic island landscape, tropical ocean, carved ki'i akua tiki statues, palm-fringed coast

male_attire.clothing: flowing feather cloak (ahu ula) in red and yellow feathers over bare chest, tapa bark cloth (kapa) malo loincloth
male_attire.headwear: crested feather helmet (mahiole) in red and yellow with forward-curving crest
male_attire.accessories: whale-tooth hook pendant (lei niho palaoa) on braided human hair cord, shell lei necklace, wrist guards of woven fibers

female_attire.clothing: tapa bark cloth (kapa) wraparound skirt (pa'u) with geometric stamped designs, shoulder drape of fine kapa cloth, flower garlands
female_attire.headwear: crown of braided ferns and fragrant maile leaves, or red-feathered lei po'o headband
female_attire.accessories: whale tooth pendant (lei niho palaoa), shell and seed lei necklaces in multiple strands, flower lei (plumeria, pikake)

inca.name: Inca Empire
inca.setting: Machu Picchu, Andes mountains, Incan ashlar stone walls, agricultural terraces

male_attire.clothing: finely woven alpaca wool uncu tunic with tocapu geometric patterns in bright colors, yacolla mantle draped over shoulders
male_attire.headwear: royal llautu headband with multicolored fringe (mascapaicha) falling over forehead, feather plume
male_attire.accessories: large gold ear spools (orejones), gold pectoral disc, coca bag at waist, gold arm bands

female_attire.clothing: ankle-length woven aksu dress secured at shoulders with gold tupu pins, wide chumpi woven belt with geometric patterns, lliclla shawl over shoulders
female_attire.headwear: folded cloth headband (vincha) with gold ornament, or gold diadem with feather accent
female_attire.accessories: large gold tupu shawl pins, gold disc earrings, shell and turquoise bead necklace, woven chuspa coca bag

majapahit.name: Majapahit Empire
majapahit.setting: Javanese candi temple, tropical garden, Majapahit court with gamelans, rice terraces

male_attire.clothing: batik-patterned kain sarong in brown and indigo wrapped at waist, bare chest with gold chest chain, embroidered dodot cloth draped diagonally
male_attire.headwear: gold makuta crown in stepped pyramidal shape with kala monster-face motif, or tekes headcloth wrapped tall
male_attire.accessories: elaborate gold kala-motif arm bands, gold belt with ceremonial keris dagger, gold ear ornaments, gemstone rings

female_attire.clothing: batik kain panjang wrapped as floor-length skirt, sheer kemben breast cloth with gold-thread border, selendang sash draped over shoulder
female_attire.headwear: gold crown with lotus and floral motifs (siger), hair in elaborate sanggul bun with gold pins and flower garlands
female_attire.accessories: gold gelang bracelet sets, ornate gold kalung necklace, gold subang ear ornaments, jeweled pending waist ornament

ming.name: Ming Dynasty China
ming.setting: Forbidden City, Chinese dragon motifs, blue-and-white porcelain, Great Wall

male_attire.clothing: dragon-embroidered silk longpao robe in imperial yellow with five-clawed dragon roundels, crossed collar, wide sleeves, jade-buckle belt
male_attire.headwear: winged black gauze futou official's cap, or mianguan twelve-stringed bead ceremonial crown
male_attire.accessories: jade belt plaques, jade pendant, silk court boots, gold-threaded collar, ivory hu tablet

female_attire.clothing: embroidered silk ao jacket over flowing chang skirt (aoqun), phoenix motifs in gold thread, wide sleeves with layered cuffs, brocade sash
female_attire.headwear: phoenix crown (fengguang) with gold filigree, kingfisher feather inlay (dian cui), pearl and jade dangles
female_attire.accessories: gold and jade hairpins in multiple styles, pearl earrings, jade bracelet, embroidered silk cloud-toe shoes

mongolia.name: Mongol Empire
mongolia.setting: vast steppe grassland, Mongol ger (yurt), cavalry banners with horse-tail standards (tug)

male_attire.clothing: heavy silk or leather deel robe overlapping left-over-right, cinched with wide leather belt, fur-lined collar and cuffs, leather riding boots
male_attire.headwear: fur-trimmed conical leather helmet with horsehair crest, or boqta (tall ceremonial hat) in peacetime
male_attire.accessories: composite bow on back, gold belt buckle with animal motifs, leather quiver, horse-head fiddle at side

female_attire.clothing: richly embroidered silk deel robe with wide sash belt, layered with fur-lined outer cloak, high collar with gold thread
female_attire.headwear: tall boqta headdress (birch-bark frame covered in silk, adorned with peacock feathers and gold ornaments at peak)
female_attire.accessories: gold and turquoise pendant earrings, silver belt ornaments, coral bead necklace, embroidered leather boots

normandy.name: Norman Kingdom
normandy.setting: medieval stone castle, Norman keep, Romanesque church, Bayeux tapestry-style imagery

male_attire.clothing: riveted chainmail hauberk over padded gambeson, heraldic surcoat with embroidered coat of arms, leather belt with iron buckle
male_attire.headwear: conical nasal helm with nose guard, or iron crown over chainmail coif
male_attire.accessories: kite shield with Norman heraldry, longsword in leather scabbard, gold crucifix pendant, leather riding gloves

female_attire.clothing: long woolen bliaut gown with fitted bodice and flared skirts, wide decorative sleeves, embroidered girdle belt, linen chemise underneath
female_attire.headwear: linen wimple and veil over hair, or gold circlet crown with trailing silk veil
female_attire.accessories: gold brooch at neckline, jeweled belt clasp, rosary beads, embroidered leather shoes

songhai.name: Songhai Empire
songhai.setting: Timbuktu Djinguereber mosque, Niger River, Saharan trading post, mud-brick Sudano-Sahelian architecture

male_attire.clothing: flowing grand boubou robe in rich indigo or white cotton with elaborate gold embroidery at collar and chest, wide sleeves, inner tunic
male_attire.headwear: white cloth turban wrapped in Sahelian style with tail draped over shoulder, or embroidered kufi cap
male_attire.accessories: gold ornaments, leather amulet pouch (gris-gris), ceremonial sword with leather-wrapped hilt, leather sandals

female_attire.clothing: richly dyed indigo or white cotton wrapper skirt (pagne) and matching blouse with gold embroidery, shawl draped over shoulder
female_attire.headwear: elaborate headwrap (gele) in dyed cotton with gold thread, tied in sculpted style
female_attire.accessories: heavy gold hoop earrings, layered gold necklaces, gold arm bands, henna-patterned hands, amber bead waist chain

spain.name: Spanish Empire
spain.setting: Spanish galleon, Alhambra arches, New World discovery, Castilian cathedral

male_attire.clothing: polished steel half-armor cuirass and gorget over black velvet doublet, white linen ruff collar, slashed trunk hose, short cape
male_attire.headwear: morion helmet with comb crest, or black velvet toque cap with gold medallion
male_attire.accessories: gold cross pendant, Toledo steel rapier in ornate scabbard, leather gauntlets, conquistador boots

female_attire.clothing: richly embroidered velvet Spanish court gown (verdugado) with wide farthingale skirt, fitted bodice with gold lacework, high stiff collar (cuello)
female_attire.headwear: pearl-studded gold diadem, or black lace mantilla veil draped over ornate comb (peineta)
female_attire.accessories: jeweled gold cross pendant, pearl strand necklace, gold filigree earrings, embroidered silk fan, rosary at waist

bulgaria.name: Second Bulgarian Empire
bulgaria.setting: Veliko Tarnovo fortress (Tsarevets), Bulgarian Orthodox church, Balkan mountain pass, frescoed interior

male_attire.clothing: heavy brocade kaftan-style robe (dalmatic) with gold-embroidered borders over tunic, wide sash belt, soft leather boots reaching mid-calf
male_attire.headwear: jeweled stemma crown (Byzantine-influenced) with cross finial and pendant chains (prependoulia) at temples
male_attire.accessories: gold and enamel pectoral cross, jeweled orb and scepter, gold belt with enamel medallions, ceremonial labrys

female_attire.clothing: Byzantine-influenced silk dalmatic gown with wide embroidered borders, loros sash crossed at chest, flowing sleeves with gold-thread cuffs, under-tunic of white linen
female_attire.headwear: jeweled crown with pearl and gem pendilia hanging at temples, silk veil draped behind crown
female_attire.accessories: gold and enamel cross pendant, pearl chandelier earrings, gold filigree bracelet, jeweled belt with enamel plaques

dai_viet.name: Dai Viet
dai_viet.setting: Thang Long Imperial Citadel, Vietnamese pagoda, rice paddies, Red River delta, dragon-adorned gates

male_attire.clothing: layered silk ao dai-style long tunic with side slits over loose trousers, cross-collar inner robe, wide sash belt in contrasting color
male_attire.headwear: black gauze phuong (turban-style headcloth) or mitered court hat with gold ornaments, mandarin square badge on chest
male_attire.accessories: jade belt plaque, ceremonial sword in lacquered scabbard, ivory fan, scholar's brush case, embroidered cloth shoes

female_attire.clothing: flowing ao tu than (four-paneled robe) over wide-leg trousers, cross-collar with gold-embroidered hems, silk sash at waist
female_attire.headwear: elaborate gold khan dong headpiece with jade ornaments, or black silk turban with gold pins, hair in long braid or updo
female_attire.accessories: gold filigree earrings, jade bangle, betel nut container at waist, lotus-embroidered silk slippers, painted silk fan

iceland.name: Icelandic Commonwealth
iceland.setting: Thingvellir assembly site, volcanic landscape with geysers, turf longhouse, dramatic fjords, northern lights

male_attire.clothing: heavy wool tunic (kyrtill) with tablet-woven trim at neck and cuffs, over linen undershirt, wool cloak (mottull) pinned at right shoulder, woolen trousers with leg wraps
male_attire.headwear: rounded wool or leather cap, or bare-headed with windswept hair for chieftains
male_attire.accessories: ornate penannular brooch (ring pin) in silver or bronze, wide leather belt with iron buckle, seax knife in sheath, arm rings of twisted silver

female_attire.clothing: wool smokkr (strap dress/apron dress) over full-length linen underdress, rectangular wool shawl fastened at front, embroidered hems
female_attire.headwear: linen headcloth (faldr) wrapped and pinned, or kransen (circlet) of woven wool and metal for unmarried women
female_attire.accessories: pair of oval tortoise brooches (skallar) connecting smokkr straps, bead festoon between brooches (amber, glass, crystal), keys on chain at waist (symbol of household authority), silver arm ring

pirates.name: Republic of Pirates
pirates.setting: Nassau harbor, Caribbean ship deck, Jolly Roger flag, tropical coast with palm trees, treasure chests

male_attire.clothing: long weathered captain's coat in dark blue or red over loose white linen shirt, wide leather belt with pistol and cutlass, canvas breeches, tall bucket-top boots
male_attire.headwear: wide-brimmed tricorn hat with feather or bare head with bandana headscarf
male_attire.accessories: flintlock pistol on baldric, curved cutlass, leather bandolier with shot, gold earring, compass on chain, smoking fuse braids

female_attire.clothing: practical linen shirt with rolled sleeves, leather corset-vest over shirt, wide sash at waist, flowing divided skirt or breeches, tall boots
female_attire.headwear: silk headscarf tied at back, or wide-brimmed hat with feather plume
female_attire.accessories: flintlock pistol at belt, cutlass, gold hoop earrings, compass pendant, leather wrist guard, rope-braided bracelet

shawnee.name: Shawnee Confederacy
shawnee.setting: Ohio River valley, forest clearing, birch bark council house, Great Lakes woodland, campfire council circle

male_attire.clothing: fringed buckskin hunting shirt with quillwork decoration, leather leggings with side-seam fringe, breechclout, trade cloth blanket over one shoulder
male_attire.headwear: silver headband with single eagle feather at back, or gustoweh-style cap with deer hair roach and feather
male_attire.accessories: silver gorget at throat, beaded bandolier bag across chest, tomahawk at belt, quillwork moccasins, face paint in red and black

female_attire.clothing: knee-length buckskin or trade-cloth dress with cape-like yoke, decorated with quillwork and shell fringe, leggings, woven sash belt
female_attire.headwear: silver hair combs and brooches, or beaded headband with small feather, hair in long braids with otter fur wraps
female_attire.accessories: silver brooches in cascading row down front, wampum bead earrings, quillwork moccasins, woven burden strap basket

america.name: United States of America
america.setting: Independence Hall, American flag, colonial architecture, eastern seaboard

male_attire.clothing: colonial-era navy blue frock coat with brass buttons, cream waistcoat, white linen cravat, knee breeches with white stockings
male_attire.headwear: black tricorn hat with cockade, or beaver felt top hat
male_attire.accessories: silver pocket watch and chain, leather document satchel, buckled shoes, quill pen

female_attire.clothing: colonial-era cotton and silk gown with fitted bodice, fichu scarf at neckline, wide pannier skirt, elbow-length sleeves with lace cuffs
female_attire.headwear: white linen mob cap with ribbon, or straw bonnet with ribbon ties
female_attire.accessories: cameo brooch at throat, pearl earrings, lace handkerchief, small reticule purse, buckled leather shoes

buganda.name: Kingdom of Buganda
buganda.setting: Bugandan thatched palace (Lubiri), Lake Victoria shore, tropical gardens, reed-fenced compound

male_attire.clothing: bark cloth (olubugo) robe in warm brown draped toga-style over one shoulder, white cotton kanzu inner tunic, leather belt
male_attire.headwear: beaded ceremonial crown (ekikonge) with feather crest, or bark cloth head wrap with gold ornament
male_attire.accessories: leopard skin sash (symbol of royalty), ivory bracelet, copper arm bands, ceremonial spear and shield

female_attire.clothing: bark cloth (olubugo) wraparound dress with wide sash belt, cotton gomesi-style gathered dress with square neckline and puff sleeves
female_attire.headwear: beaded headband with cowrie shells, or bark cloth headwrap with gold ornaments
female_attire.accessories: layered bead necklaces in red, white, and blue, copper bangles, cowrie shell belt, ankle beads

french_empire.name: French Empire
french_empire.setting: Versailles palace, Arc de Triomphe, French tricolor banners, gilded interiors

male_attire.clothing: dark blue Napoleonic military tunic with gold epaulettes, white waistcoat and breeches, high leather boots, gold-braided sash
male_attire.headwear: black felt bicorne hat with tricolor cockade and gold trim
male_attire.accessories: Legion of Honor medal, ceremonial sword with gold hilt, white leather gloves, gold pocket watch

female_attire.clothing: high-waisted Empire silhouette gown in white muslin or silk with gold-embroidered bodice, short puffed sleeves, flowing train, satin sash below bust
female_attire.headwear: gold laurel-leaf tiara, or jeweled bandeau with ostrich feather plume
female_attire.accessories: long satin gloves to elbow, pearl drop earrings, cameo necklace, cashmere shawl draped at elbows, silk dancing slippers

meiji.name: Meiji Japan
meiji.setting: Japanese castle, cherry blossoms, rising sun motif, modernizing Japan with Western and traditional elements

male_attire.clothing: Meiji-era military dress uniform in dark navy with gold braid, standing collar, brass buttons, or formal montsuki kimono with hakama
male_attire.headwear: military kepi cap with chrysanthemum crest badge, or traditional eboshi court cap
male_attire.accessories: chrysanthemum imperial crest pin, ceremonial katana in gold-fitted scabbard, white gloves, polished black boots

female_attire.clothing: formal twelve-layered junihitoe court kimono in graduated colors, or Meiji-era uchikake over-robe with elaborate chrysanthemum and wave embroidery, wide obi sash
female_attire.headwear: ornate gold and lacquer kanzashi hairpins in elaborate nihongami hairstyle, or small gold tiara in Western-influenced style
female_attire.accessories: gold and pearl hair ornaments, sensu folding fan with gold leaf, tabi socks and zori sandals, jade bracelet

mexico.name: Independent Mexico
mexico.setting: Mexico City metropolitan cathedral, agave fields, eagle on cactus (coat of arms) symbol, Zocalo plaza

male_attire.clothing: dark blue Mexican military dress uniform with gold-braided frogging, red sash of office across chest, white trousers with gold stripe
male_attire.headwear: plumed military shako hat with Mexican eagle badge, or gold-braided kepi
male_attire.accessories: curved cavalry saber, gold eagle and serpent belt buckle, polished boots with spurs, tricolor cockade

female_attire.clothing: Romantic-era gown with fitted bodice and full skirt in Mexican tricolor-inspired colors, rebozo shawl draped elegantly, lace-trimmed neckline
female_attire.headwear: gold and jeweled peineta comb in upswept hair with flowers, or mantilla lace veil
female_attire.accessories: gold filigree earrings, coral bead necklace, embroidered silk fan, rosary, tortoiseshell combs

mughal.name: Mughal Empire
mughal.setting: Taj Mahal, Mughal charbagh garden, ornate pietra dura marble inlay, Mughal miniature painting style

male_attire.clothing: elaborate brocade jama robe with flared skirt tied at left, layered with jeweled patka sash, fine muslin inner tunic, churidar fitted trousers
male_attire.headwear: jeweled turban (pagri) with gold aigrette (sarpech) plume holder and central gem, pearl strings draped at side
male_attire.accessories: layered pearl necklace (haar), gem-encrusted rings on multiple fingers, jeweled dagger (khanjar) at waist, jeweled thumb ring for archery

female_attire.clothing: richly embroidered silk anarkali tunic with wide flared skirt, churidar trousers, sheer dupatta veil draped over head and shoulders, jeweled belt
female_attire.headwear: gold and pearl-encrusted jhoomar side ornament, maang tikka forehead chain, hair in long braid with gold paranda
female_attire.accessories: elaborate jhumka chandelier earrings, multi-strand pearl choker, emerald-set gold bangles, jeweled nose ring (nath) with chain

prussia.name: Kingdom of Prussia
prussia.setting: Brandenburg Gate, Prussian parade ground, iron eagle standard, Potsdam palace

male_attire.clothing: dark blue Prussian military tunic (Waffenrock) with red piping, brass buttons, standing collar, white cross-belt, knee-high polished boots
male_attire.headwear: spiked Pickelhaube helmet with brass eagle plate, or grenadier's mitre cap for formal occasions
male_attire.accessories: Iron Cross medal at collar, Prussian eagle belt buckle, ceremonial saber, white cotton gloves

female_attire.clothing: Biedermeier-era gown with fitted bodice, wide bell-shaped skirt, leg-of-mutton sleeves, high neckline with lace collar, dark blue and white color scheme
female_attire.headwear: small jeweled tiara or diadem, or bonnet with silk ribbons and Prussian blue trim
female_attire.accessories: iron cross brooch (iron jewelry was patriotic in Prussia), cameo pendant, kid leather gloves, silk sash in Prussian blue

qing.name: Qing Dynasty China
qing.setting: Forbidden City, nine-dragon screen wall, Qing imperial court, garden pavilion

male_attire.clothing: formal dragon robe (longpao) in imperial yellow with nine five-clawed dragons, horse-hoof cuff sleeves, standing Mandarin collar, silk riding jacket over
male_attire.headwear: conical winter court hat with red silk fringe and jeweled finial button denoting rank, or summer hat of woven straw with finial
male_attire.accessories: court necklace (chaozhu) of 108 amber and jade beads, jade thumb ring, embroidered pouch at belt, silk court boots with thick white soles

female_attire.clothing: embroidered Manchu-style changfu robe with standing collar, side slits, wide border of elaborate embroidery, cloud-collar overlay at shoulders
female_attire.headwear: large fan-shaped Manchu court headdress (dianzi) adorned with kingfisher feather inlay, pearls, and gold flowers
female_attire.accessories: long decorative nail guards in gold filigree, jade and pearl hairpins, court necklace of pearls, flower-shaped ear ornaments, platform shoes (qixie)

russia.name: Russian Empire
russia.setting: Winter Palace, St. Petersburg, onion dome churches, snow-covered landscape

male_attire.clothing: imperial Russian military dress uniform with gold-embroidered collar and cuffs, white tunic with gold aiguillettes, blue sash of the Order of St. Andrew
male_attire.headwear: tall astrakhan fur papakha hat, or bicorne with feather plume for formal occasions
male_attire.accessories: double-headed eagle medal, jeweled ceremonial sword, polished boots with spurs, white leather gloves

female_attire.clothing: elaborate court gown with kokoshnik-inspired bodice, wide skirt with gold-embroidered train, off-shoulder neckline with jeweled trim, long white gloves
female_attire.headwear: jeweled kokoshnik tiara (crescent-shaped headdress studded with diamonds and pearls), or gold diadem
female_attire.accessories: diamond and pearl parure set (necklace, earrings, brooches), Faberge-style jeweled brooch, sable fur stole over shoulders

siam.name: Kingdom of Siam
siam.setting: Thai temple (wat), golden spires and prangs, lotus pond, royal elephant procession

male_attire.clothing: silk chut thai prarajathan formal attire with chong kraben draped lower garment, sabai sash across chest, gold-embroidered jacket (suea)
male_attire.headwear: tall pointed gold chada crown with tiered spire, or royal mongkut coronet
male_attire.accessories: gold chain of office, ornate gold belt with pendant, jeweled rings, ceremonial sword in gold scabbard, pointed gold-tipped shoes

female_attire.clothing: silk chut thai phra ratcha niyom with sabai cloth draped diagonally over one shoulder, chong kraben lower garment in gold brocade, jeweled belt
female_attire.headwear: tiered gold chada crown with flame finials, or gold diadem with jeweled floral motifs, hair in elaborate updo
female_attire.accessories: gold choker necklace with pendant, long gold chandelier earrings, stacked gold bangles, jeweled hair pins, pointed-toe gold slippers

britain.name: British Empire
britain.setting: Houses of Parliament, British warship, Union Jack, foggy London skyline

male_attire.clothing: scarlet British military dress tunic with gold braiding and high collar, dark blue trousers with red stripe, white cross-belt with gold plate
male_attire.headwear: pith helmet (tropical) or bearskin ceremonial cap, or peaked officer's forage cap
male_attire.accessories: gold-hilted ceremonial sword, campaign medals and star orders, polished Sam Browne belt, white gloves

female_attire.clothing: Victorian bustle gown in rich silk with fitted bodice, high neckline with lace collar, leg-of-mutton sleeves, elaborate train, jet bead trim
female_attire.headwear: small jeweled crown or tiara, or fashionable bonnet with silk flowers and ribbons
female_attire.accessories: multi-strand pearl choker, diamond and sapphire brooch, long gloves, lace parasol, small beaded reticule purse

ottoman.name: Ottoman Empire
ottoman.setting: Topkapi Palace, Blue Mosque, Ottoman court with tulip gardens, Iznik tile patterns

male_attire.clothing: ornate silk kaftan robe with tulip and pomegranate brocade patterns, fur-lined edges, wide sash (kusak) at waist, inner entari gown
male_attire.headwear: tall white muslin turban (kavuk) wrapped around red felt fez base, with jeweled aigrette brooch and heron feather
male_attire.accessories: tughra seal ring, jeweled ceremonial dagger at sash, gold chain of office, curled-toe leather babouche slippers

female_attire.clothing: layered silk entari robe with long hanging sleeves, embroidered salvar trousers, short vest (yelek) over chemise, gold-threaded sash
female_attire.headwear: tall jeweled hotoz headdress with gold coins and pearl strands, sheer yasmak veil, or gold-threaded headscarf
female_attire.accessories: gold belt with gem-encrusted clasp, pearl tassel earrings, gold cuff bracelets, jeweled collar, henna-decorated hands

qajar.name: Qajar Persia
qajar.setting: Qajar palace with mirror mosaics, Persian miniature painting style, rose garden, Golestan Palace

male_attire.clothing: long ornate coat (qaba) with heavy gold embroidery over silk tunic, wide jeweled belt, fitted trousers, high-heeled leather boots
male_attire.headwear: tall black astrakhan (lambskin) hat with gold aigrette brooch and gem
male_attire.accessories: jeweled ceremonial sword, Order of the Lion and Sun medal, gold-handled walking stick, thick mustache, kohl-lined eyes

female_attire.clothing: short embroidered velvet jacket over sheer blouse, wide knee-length tutu-style gathered skirt over fitted trousers, gold-embroidered chador draped loosely
female_attire.headwear: small jeweled cap with gold coins and pearl strands across forehead, or silk headscarf with gold filigree ornaments
female_attire.accessories: heavy gold coin necklace, jeweled forehead ornament (band-e pishani), kohl-lined eyes, thick connected eyebrows (beauty mark), hennaed hands

nepal.name: Kingdom of Nepal
nepal.setting: Kathmandu Durbar Square, Himalayan mountains, multi-tiered pagoda temples, prayer flags

male_attire.clothing: daura suruwal national dress: cross-front tunic (daura) with five ties (pancha badan) and fitted trousers (suruwal), patuka waist sash, long coat (labeda) for royalty
male_attire.headwear: dhaka topi (Nepali cap) in colorful woven pattern, or jeweled gold mukut crown for royalty
male_attire.accessories: khukuri knife in ornate scabbard at waist, gold necklace with sacred thread, leather sandals, gold earrings

female_attire.clothing: red and gold sari draped in Nepali style with wide gold-embroidered border, cholo fitted blouse with gold trim, haku patasi (black sari with red border for Newari)
female_attire.headwear: gold tikka forehead ornament with red tika mark, hair in bun adorned with gold phuli (flower ornament) and fresh flowers
female_attire.accessories: bulaki (gold nose ring) with chain to ear, heavy gold necklace (tilhari), glass bangle sets in red and green, gold jantar (amulet), pote bead necklace
